name: Oyster and Sweetbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the oysters, reserving 3/4 cup of liquor. Wash the sweetbreads in cold water.
2. Let stand in cold water for 20 minutes. Drain.
3. Combine the sweetbreads and lemon slices in a saucepan. Cook, covered, in boiling salted water for 30 minutes.
4. Drain and cover the sweetbreads with cold water. When cool enough to handle, remove any connecting membrane and cut into 1-inch pieces.
5. Combine the oysters and sweetbreads. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and mace.
6. Melt butter in a small saucepan. Blend flour and 1/2 teaspoon salt.
7. Slowly stir in the cream and reserved oyster liquor. Cook, stirring over medium heat until the sauce is smooth and thickened.
8. Stir in the sweetbreads and oysters. Pour into a 1 1/2-quart casserole.
9. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes or until bubbling and hot. Serves 5 or 6.
